Grab the deal About GymBox Inside London's most creative gym with 10 locations Gymbox is London’s (in)famous challenger of the fitness landscape.
Emerging from the remnants of an old West End car park, we built a distinct community that has revolutionised the industry.
Energetic, trendy and genuinely enjoyable, our clubs are designed to keep your spirits high.
With an unmistakable nightclub atmosphere, specialised studios and top-notch equipment, we make working out as fun as going out.
You want it, we’ve got it!
What is included in a Gymbox membership?
Inclusions vary depending on what each location offers.
Gymbox is London’s most creative gym chain, with 10 locations across the city.
Known for nightclub-inspired décor, resident DJs, boxing rings, aerial studios and 70+ classes, Gymbox makes working out feel like going out.
How many Gymbox locations are there?
How much does a Gymbox membership cost?
Gymbox membership starts from £82 per month on a 12-month contract.
Prices vary by location, with memberships available on 12-month, 3-month and rolling monthly contracts.
All memberships include 5 guest passes.
Does Gymbox offer a free trial?
Yes, Gymbox offers a free trial at all 10 London locations.
You can book directly at free-trial.gymbox.com.
Does Gymbox offer student membership?
Yes, Gymbox offers student membership with up to 30% off standard prices.
Full details are available at gymbox.com/students.
Does Gymbox offer corporate membership?
Yes, Gymbox offers corporate membership with 10% off standard prices.
Full details are available at gymbox.com/corporate-wellness.
What classes does Gymbox offer?
Gymbox offers 100+ classes per week across seven categories: aerial, fight, ride, strength, holistic, rhythm and sweat.
Classes include boxing, spin, BJJ, Hyrox, aerial hoop, pole, yoga, Reformer Pilates and commercial dance.
What makes Gymbox different from other London gyms?
No two locations are the same, and every club is designed to make working out genuinely enjoyable.
Does Gymbox have personal trainers?
Yes, personal training is available at all Gymbox locations.
You can find and book a personal trainer at gymbox.com/personal-training.
What recovery facilities does Gymbox have?
Can I join Gymbox online?
Yes, you can join Gymbox online at https://join-now.gymbox.com/ .

designIntent.summary: Referencia de marca energetica com caos controlado, tipografia pesada, cores acidas e grids de classes.
designIntent.hero: Classes, cultura e neon sem pedir desculpa.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Acid Pulse
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 16% 20%, rgba(231,255,0,.34), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 70%, rgba(255,46,166,.3), transparent 38%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

risks: Texto magenta pequeno falha em preto.
Quebras de grid nao podem criar overflow.

rules: Hero full viewport com tipografia gigante e visual de clube.
Menu pode ser brutalista/neon, com categorias grandes.
Cards de classe usam inclinacao e alto contraste.
Motion entra em cortes e shifts, sem sobrepor texto.

menuSystem.note: Menu club board: alto contraste, acido e direto.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.
